name: master-plugin-repository
description: OKX internal Claude Code plugin marketplace for hackathon submissions

plugins.name: official-plugins
plugins.description: Official OKX hackathon tools — package any combination of skills, commands, agents, hooks, scripts, or MCP configs into a Claude Code plugin and submit it to this marketplace

plugins.name: onchain-redpacket
plugins.description: Onchain red packet agent — create USDC/OKB/SOL red packets on XLayer & Solana and share via link, powered by OKX Agentic Wallet

plugins.name: doraemon
plugins.description: Decentralized AI gateway — access 18 frontier models (Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok, and more) by paying in USDG on X Layer. No API keys, no accounts, no geo-restrictions.

plugins.name: onchain-arb
plugins.description: CEX-DEX and cross-chain arbitrage opportunity detector powered by onchainOS data

plugins.name: sentryx
plugins.description: Your AI-Powered Onchain Security & Alpha Guardian — auto-scans approvals, detects rug pulls, guards your portfolio, trades safely, hunts alpha signals, and runs a bidirectional x402 signal marketplace across EVM and Solana via Onchain OS.
